listing.title: AI Agent Permission Sandbox & Audit
listing.tagline: Open-source governance layer — permission boundaries, sandboxed execution, audit trails for any AI agent
listing.description: Every AI agent can theoretically bypass the rules you wrote for it. Agent Sandbox Governance gives you hard permission boundaries, sandboxed execution, and a tamper-proof audit trail of every tool call — for Claude Code, Codex, or any agent framework.
key_features: REST API for CI/CD pipeline integration
Default policy templates for common agent workflows
